headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on Invitation Homes, Raises Price Target to $29
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Jade Rahmani   maintains Invitation Homes (NYSE:INVH) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $28 to $29.
